Raw Milk Finder

Warrior Food – New Jersey

I Own This Business
Type of location
Home Delivery
Country
USA
City
Long Valley
State
Connecticut
ZIP Code
07853
Email
LandoMilkandHoney@yahoo.com
Description

Real food delivered to your door. Serving New York, New Jersey, and Connecticut. Demeter certified biodynamic milk and yogurt from upstate New York featuring milk from mostly Brown Swiss, a little Jersey, Guernsey and Devon breed cows. Also offering organic cow and sheep milk cheese, and cultured buttermilk. Other products include organic, probiotic drinks (kimchi and kraut juice), fermented vegetables (sauerkraut, ginger carrots, kimchi, curtido), hot sauce and more. Orders or questions: please e-mail LandoMilkandHoney@yahoo.com.
